title: DokiMobs Chat
body:
# Dokimobs Chat Mod Pack

**Dokimobs Chat** is a **mod pack** that brings together the sleek, low-saturation visuals of **Dokimobs** with the AI-driven conversation system of **CreaturePals**—download [Player2 App](https://player2.game/) to power the AI, no API keys or extra setup required!

<iframe
  width="560"
  height="315"
  src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/i2yfum9MJp4"
  title="YouTube video player"
  frameborder="0"
  allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

---

## 🎮 Core Features

- **Visual Refresh**  
  Reimagined mob textures and smooth animations from Dokimobs, covering friendly, neutral, and hostile creatures.  
- **AI-Powered Chat**  
  Free, in-game conversations with any mob via CreatureChat Evolved and Player2’s cloud APIs.  
- **Dynamic Interactions**  
  Mobs remember past interactions, react to damage or gifts, and even chat among themselves and other players.  

---

## ⚙️ Installation

1. **Download the Player2 app** (free):  
   👉 [player2.game](https://player2.game/)
2. **Install This ModPack with Modrinth**  
3. **Launch Minecraft and enjoy chatty, charming chaos!**

---

## 🔗 Original Mods

- **CreaturePals**: Free AI chats & memory for every mob.  
- **Dokimobs**: Polished, cohesive visuals & animations. [https://modrinth.com/mod/dokimobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/dokimobs)

---

> “Rediscover familiar creatures through a polished lens—and make new friends along the way!”
